message:
fix: witness race conditions and error handling (gt-v95d)

- Add mutex to recordBeadRespawn to prevent concurrent load-modify-save
  races on the bead-respawn-counts.json file
- Fix error aggregation in handlePolecatDonePendingMR: preserve first
  error when notifyRefineryMergeReady also fails
- Fix error aggregation in handleZombieRestart: collect all errors from
  escalation, wisp creation, and restart instead of silently dropping
- Remove deprecated handleZombieCleanup (no callers, superseded by
  handleZombieRestart per gt-dsgp)
